(institutional or non-institutional) claims that are at least one day apart, with a lung cancer code in any 
position during the one-year reference period. When two claims are required, they must occur at least 
one day apart. 

The CCW’s criteria were developed after reviewing validated algorithms from the research literature 
and criteria used by other federal data sources. You can find more detailed information on the criteria 
on the CCW
